title: Beads/git commit failures on .beads tmp and index.lock during AI agent workflow
description: bd update/close fails with git index.lock or missing tmp files during auto-commit of .beads JSON. Occurred multiple times despite rm of locks. Other modified files in rust/ suggest previous incomplete sessions. Test collection for pytest also fails with type | operator errors despite requires-python >=3.11 and future annotations. Needs human review of git state, beads setup, and Python env for tests. Prioritize P0 as it blocks all AI agent work on beads.
